title: upload page loads
description: Open the app, verify the Upload page loads, and verify the Files and ZIP mode controls are visible.

title: gallery page loads
description: Navigate to Gallery and verify the All, Indexed, Processing, Failed, and liked-only controls render.

title: search page loads
description: Navigate to Search and verify the query input and Search action are visible.

title: clusters page loads
description: Navigate to Clusters and verify the page renders without a client-side crash.
